transactions.desc: The Astros optioned Gordon to Triple-A Sugar Land on Thursday, Chandler Rome of The Athletic reports.
The Astros activated Abreu from the restricted list Thursday, Chandler Rome of The Athletic reports.
The Rangers activated Seager from the 7-day concussion injured list Thursday.
The Brewers optioned Yoho to Triple-A Nashville on Thursday, Jack Stern of BrewerFanatic.com reports.
Siani cleared waivers Thursday and was sent outright to Triple-A Norfolk, Roch Kubatko of MASNSports.com reports.
The Mets recalled Mauricio from Triple-A Syracuse on Thursday.
The Mets recalled Duarte from Triple-A Syracuse on Thursday.
The Mets returned Pintaro to Triple-A Syracuse on Thursday.
Mastrobuoni cleared waivers Thursday and was sent outright to Triple-A Tacoma.
The Athletics recalled Williams from Triple-A Las Vegas on Thursday.
The Cubs designated Zulueta for assignment Thursday.
The Pirates recalled Brannigan from Double-A Altoona on Thursday.
Paddack elected free agency Wednesday after clearing waivers.
The Cubs outrighted Peralta to Triple-A Iowa on Wednesday.
The Athletics released Barlow on Wednesday.
The Rays recalled Grove from Triple-A Durham on Thursday.
The Chicago Cubs traded INF Cole Mathis to the New York Mets.
The New York Mets traded LHP David Peterson to the Chicago Cubs.
The Nationals optioned Palmquist to Triple-A Rochester following Wednesday's game against the Phillies.
The Giants optioned Beck to Triple-A Sacramento on Wednesday, Justice delos Santos of The San Jose Mercury News reports.
The Giants  reinstated Mahle (hamstring) from the 15-day injured list ahead of his start Wednesday against the Athletics in San Francisco.
The Mets reinstated Mauricio (thumb) from the 10-day injured list Wednesday and optioned him to Triple-A Syracuse, Andrew Tredinnick of The Bergen Record reports.
The Mets designated Short for assignment on Wednesday, Andrew Tredinnick of The Bergen Record reports.
The Cubs designated Roa for assignment Wednesday, Meghan Montemurro of the Chicago Tribune reports.
The Cubs claimed Wilson off waivers from the Phillies on Wednesday, Meghan Montemurro of the Chicago Tribune reports.
The Astros recalled Gordon from Triple-A Sugar Land on Wednesday.
The Astros optioned VanWey to Triple-A Sugar Land on Wednesday.
The Mets reinstated Lindor (calf) from the 10-day injured list ahead of the second game of Wednesday's doubleheader with the Cubs. He'll start at shortstop and bat second.
The Nationals designated Lara for assignment Wednesday.
The Nationals claimed Lawrence off waivers from the Twins on Wednesday.
